title: Federal block grants
doc_html:
§1554.1. Federal block grants

            The provisions of this Chapter shall be applicable to any goods and services procured with funds pursuant to the federally enacted community services block grant or community development block grant.

            Added by Acts 1982, No. 603, §1; Acts 2014, No. 864, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

NOTE: Redesignated in part and amended by Acts 2014, No. 864, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

with funds pursuant to the federally enacted community services block grant or community
development block grant.
